scripts.render:demo: remotion render src/index.tsx PreuvanceBuildWeekDemo out/preuvance-build-week-demo.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18 --concurrency=2
scripts.render: remotion render src/index.tsx PreuvanceHackathon out/preuvance-hackathon.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18 --concurrency=2
scripts.render:vertical: remotion render src/index.tsx PreuvanceHackathonVertical out/preuvance-hackathon-vertical.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18 --concurrency=2
scripts.render:higgsfield: remotion render src/index.tsx PreuvanceHackathon out/preuvance-hackathon-higgsfield.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18 --concurrency=2 --props=./higgsfield-enabled.json
scripts.frames: npm run frame:opening && npm run frame:evidence && npm run frame:bridge
